work_item: Validate LONG side: counter-ribbon named-level bounce (CALLS off named Active/Carry support, ribbon gate relaxed, ITM+tight, cap 2/session) via real fills. Anchors: 06-26 PML 728.50 reclaim (this side), 06-24 PMH 737.11 reject (SHORT, other side).

Real OPRA 2025-01-02..2026-06-18, 365 days, structural-proxy levels (PDH/PDL/PDC/PMH/PML). 538 signals (265 long). 12-cell LONG grid (strike{ITM-2,ITM-1,ATM}x stop{-99,-50}x tp{30,50}): exp -$38 to -$51/trade, OOS all negative, WR 36-46%, 0/6 positive quarters. 0/12 cells beat null-MAX: real exp -$38..-$50 vs null_max -$0.46..-$9.78 at SAME days/sides/times -> level selection is WORSE than random (C3/L183). Exit-hist 167/253 PREMIUM_STOP + 71 RIBBON_FLIP_BACK (counter-ribbon fade run over).
regime_finding: ATM cell: range days n=250 exp -$38.36 (where almost all fire, by construction); trend days n=3 exp -$69 (negligible). No regime rescues.
theta_note: ITM+tight is correct for vwap WITH-trend continuation but does NOT rescue a counter-ribbon REVERSAL entry. It does not bleed slowly here -- it gets premium-stopped (167 exits). Anti-theta hypothesis sound for with-trend, irrelevant for fade.

work_item: Real-fills A/B: does the STRUCTURE-VETO improve the engine? Wire crypto.lib.market_structure.classify_trend (5m-sameday) into the entry path as a direction-vs-trend VETO (block P-in-uptrend / C-in-downtrend; range/unknown=no-veto). BASE=current production (real fills + managed exits) vs CANDIDATE=BASE+veto over full OPRA history. Monkey-patch on evaluate_bearish_setup + evaluate_bullish_setup; production untouched.
evidence: Full OPRA real-fills A/B 2025-01-02..2026-06-18 BASE vs +veto. ANCHOR no-regression PASS: edge_capture $780 base = $780 candidate (delta $0), all 3 J PUT winners kept, all 4 loser days handled identically -- 5/04 (+$730 biggest winner) preserved because it reads RANGE on all TFs and range=no-veto. Full P&L +7,555 -> +8,138 (+$583), sharpe_daily 4.340 -> 4.728 (+9%), final_score 3,385 -> 3,688 (+303), maxDD flat -2,273. Veto removes 2 WRONG-WAY losers net -$574 (both bear PUTs fired into a confirmed 5m uptrend = the exact 2026-06-26 wrong-way-PUT class), 0 winners. 107 bars vetoed full but only 2 -> a removed PLACED trade (other 105 already excluded by quality-lock/cap/escalation gates). 2/6 quarters positive, 0/6 negative. HONEST CAVEAT: OOS-2026 delta = $0 (n unchanged 21->21) -- existing gates already exclude every counter-structure bar that would place, so OOS realized benefit is zero; entire +$583 is IS-concentrated in 2025Q1. This is primarily a ROBUSTNESS/SAFETY veto (provably removes a known wrong-way class, never a winner) not a P&L engine. DO NOT tighten to require-confirmed-downtrend (would block 5/04, break OP-16). Ship = add params key structure_veto_enabled + wire classify_trend into orchestrator entry path, replacing the lagging EMA-ribbon trend read. Gym 97/98 PASS before+after, no production file touched.
